name: Media Tagging Manager Jellyfin Plugin
description: TEST BUILD — tags selected Jellyfin media with streaming providers and TV networks. Not a stable release.
overview: TEST BUILD — provider and network tagging for selected Jellyfin libraries.

versions.changelog: 0.1.0.27-test adds the reorganized five-tab dashboard, logo-only settings, unknown provider/network name and logo editing, collapsible Library Overview, Clear Filters, and synchronized Scan scheduled-task settings. Test only; not a stable release.
